arts.sum: The hosts are unchanged, while Bournemouth make two alterations The post Newcastle v Bournemouth team news: Schar a sub, Kepa returns appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 12.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Latest table | And you can email Barry At his pre-match conference yesterday, Bournemouth’s manager was asked if he considers Newcastle to be genuine title contenders. “It’s a big question,” he said. “They are not so far from Arsenal, for example, and Arsenal definitely are title challengers. “Probably you need to ask Eddie the question. They are playing so, so well that it makes you ask me these questions. They are beating everyone, also they’ve done it in a run of games that was not easy: they beat Arsenal, [Manchester] United and Tottenham in this period. They’ve performed better than them but I’m not brave enough to say it [that they are title contenders].” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Newcastle set Lloyd Kelly asking price, Andres Garcia to Aston Villa, Wilfried Zaha to MLS
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Newcastle United's Lloyd Kelly asking price, Andres Garcia to Aston Villa and Wilfried Zaha to the MLS.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United swooping in to try and beat Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace to signing
arts.sum: Multiple transfer situations are turning into dramas as the window grows older and added stress is poured over ongoing sagas. Luiz Henrique is very much in one of those situations. The Botafogo winger has been the subject of serious Fiorentina interest, but they’re apparently getting frustrated at Premier League clubs trying to muscle in and The post Newcastle United swooping in to try and beat Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace to signing appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: James Trafford makes 'crying' mind games Sunderland claim that Newcastle United diehards will love
arts.sum: Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford claimed he wasn't playing mind games with Sunderland forward Wilson Isidor during an astonishing end to their game at Turf Moor. Trafford admitted he was surprised by Isidor stepping up to take a second penalty at Turf Moor.

arts.ttl: The Alexander Isak mega deal that can change EVERYTHING at Newcastle United and Chelsea regret
arts.sum: With 52 goals for Newcastle already, Isak smashed one record this week by scoring for the eighth successive game in a row in the Premier League, moving past Alan Shearer and Joe Willock in the process. Newcastle played down suggestions that they were in talks with Isak earlier in the season over a new deal.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Bryan Mbeumo transfer latest, Brentford stance and asking price
arts.sum: Newcastle United are just one Premier League club linked with a move for Bryan Mbeumo this January window, though his transfer from Brentford won't be a simple one. Howe's side have been linked with a number of targets this month, but transfer expert Ben Jacobs claims the Magpies are the only club to have made a concrete offer for Mbeumo.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United appoint former Chelsea executive in shrewd January move
arts.sum: The Magpies have appointed Simon Meehan as the club's head of content with with the strategist coming in after stints with Google, Tata Group and in the European Parliament. Meehan joined Brentford from London rivals Chelsea after three years as head of publishing.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle host Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday lunchtime in search of a new club record. The Magpies are targeting a 10th consecutive win in all competitions following a fine run of form. Newcastle thrashed Wolves in midweek with Alexander Isak on target twice. The Swedish striker has scored in eight consecutive Premier League […] The post Newcastle vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Bournemouth, TV channel, live stream and early kick-off time
arts.sum: Newcastle United can give their top four hopes a huge boost by securing three points against Premier League rivals Bournemouth today - thereby extending their winning run to 10 matches in all competitions. It is the first of five Premier League fixtures today, with four on Sunday, and one Monday night match.
